title: rubus viretorum
intro: Rubus viretorum, also known as the 'Green-Flowering Bramble', is a type of thorny shrub in the rose family (Rosaceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Rubus viretorum are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus viretorum are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
